sentences.translation: Porodica je otišla u restoran da proslavi.
sentences.translationEn: The family went to a restaurant to celebrate.

sentences.translation: Naručili su mnogo hrane, sok i slatkiše.
sentences.translationEn: They ordered a lot of food, juice, and sweets.

sentences.arabic: غَنَّى النَّادِلُ أُغْنِيَةَ عِيدِ الْمِيلَادِ لِلطِّفْلِ.
sentences.translation: Konobar je zapjevao pjesmu za dječakov rođendan.
sentences.translationEn: The waiter sang a birthday song for the child.

sentences.translation: Dijete se nasmijalo i bilo veoma sretno.
sentences.translationEn: The child laughed and was very happy.
